text: A FACHADA NÃO É A OBRA
prompt:
A clean, modern editorial illustration for a LinkedIn CAROUSEL COVER. Concept: "AI builds the facade; engineering builds the foundation — vibe coding produces a beautiful surface over a rotting base; the 6 pillars of real AI engineering hold it up." Context for the model to understand the meaning: a catchy, slightly ironic cover for a carousel about taking AI to production. The joke: the flashy AI-generated demo (facade) looks perfect, but the real work is the foundation underneath (harness, context, evals, security, memory safety, attention management). Warm, human, a bit playful — not cold corporate.

Isometric 3D editorial style, corporate tech palette (deep navy background, teal and cyan accents, white), with a warm amber accent for "rot/danger" elements, subtle grid background, professional, minimal, high detail, square 1:1 composition, no watermark, no logos.

Show a clear BEFORE/FACADE vs FOUNDATION split. On the TOP/FRONT (the facade): a sleek, attractive, glossy building facade / storefront (clean teal/cyan, perfect, glowing) — representing the AI-generated demo that "looks impressive". BUT drawn so we can see THROUGH/BENEATH it: the FOUNDATION under the facade is cracked, tilted, held by a few rickety amber-glowing pillars labeled by chaos (a "TODO: FIX LATER" sticky note, a fragile stack, cracks). This is the "vibe coding" debt.

On the RIGHT or BESIDE it, a SECOND structure: same beautiful facade BUT this time the FOUNDATION underneath is solid — strong teal pillars with small clean icons on them: a shield (security), a checklist (evals/tests), a sensor/gauge (monitoring), a gear (architecture), a lock (memory safety). A pair of stylized, warm, minimal human hands (acolhedoras — caring, not corporate) are actively reinforcing/placing one of the solid foundation pillars. A small friendly AI robot (luminous cyan sphere with a simple happy face) assists, handing a tool to the hands. A bold arrow flows from the weak amber foundation → to the solid teal foundation (the transformation). Outcome: facade is easy; foundation is the work.

Keep it to a maximum of 6 visual blocks: (1) the beautiful facade on top (shared), (2) the cracked amber foundation under the left structure, (3) the solid teal foundation with icons under the right structure, (4) the caring human hands placing a pillar, (5) the friendly AI robot handing a tool, (6) the transformation arrow. Generous white space; emphasize the OUTCOME (rotten base vs engineered base), playful but professional. Icons of a single consistent isometric 3D style. Warm tone (amber = rot/debt, teal/cyan = solid engineering).

Do NOT include any office scene, business people in suits, meetings, sales charts, wireframe spheres, or abstract beauty without meaning. Bold modern sans-serif text overlay reading exactly "A FACHADA NÃO É A OBRA", centered and clearly legible, WITH correct Portuguese accents (ã, ç, é, ã). Show ONLY this single headline — do NOT add any other labels, captions, callouts or annotations. Keep it to a maximum of 6 visual blocks. Bold modern sans-serif text overlay reading exactly "A FACHADA NÃO É A OBRA", centered and clearly legible. Show ONLY this single headline — do NOT add any other labels, captions, callouts or annotations. Keep it to a maximum of 4 visual blocks.
